display_name: Run YOUR own UNCENSORED AI & Use it for Hacking
author: Zade (Gecurity / zSecurity)

chapters: Pulling HuggingFace Models via Open WebUI

key_takeaways: HuggingFace has 800+ uncensored AI models filterable via &other=uncensored URL param
Q4KM quantization is recommended balance of quality vs size (~18GB for 30B model)
HuggingFace hardware compatibility tool checks if your specs can run a model
Hostinger VPS with Ollama template auto-installs Ollama + Open WebUI (no commands needed)
KVM8 plan (32GB RAM, 8 vCPU) at ~$20/mo is sufficient for large uncensored models
Open WebUI can pull models from HuggingFace directly (not just ollama.com)
Multiple models can coexist — eject one to free resources before loading another
Reasoning/thinking models (Qwen3 22B) give better answers but are slower
Coding models (Qwen3 Coder 30B) are especially good for hacking tasks
